title: cumetea microphyla
side_effects: Cumetea microphyla can have side effects if used improperly, such as excessive consumption leading to nausea, dizziness, and stomach discomfort. Overuse of the plant's extract has also been linked to allergic reactions, including hives, itching, and swelling. In rare cases, improper use of cumetea microphyla may cause more severe side effects, such as an increased heart rate, high blood pressure, and respiratory problems. It is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using the cumetea microphyla plant for medicinal purposes.
